aliases: Deputy Chief of Armed Forces for Operations
role: Deputy Chief of Armed Forces for Operations
bio: Mehdi Rabbani served as Deputy Chief of Armed Forces for Operations under the [General Staff of the Armed Forces](/orgs/general-staff-of-the-armed-forces), responsible for operational planning and coordination across Iran's military branches. He was killed on 14 June 2025 in the opening strikes of the [Israeli Twelve-Day War campaign](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-june-2025). Note: He is distinct from [Mohsen Rabbani](/people/mohsen-rabbani), the Argentine-based MOIS operative linked to the AMIA bombing.
editorial_notes: NOT Mohsen Rabbani (AMIA figure). Deputy Chief of Armed Forces for Operations. Killed 14 June 2025.
